precondition.description: This design expands Stage 7C from the original 2-case smoke into a 4-case controlled expansion.

objective.summary: Expand Stage 7C shadow subset from 2 cases to 4 cases. No gate relaxing. No authority change. No assist mode.
objective.authority_after_expansion: shadow_only — baseline tactical + MPC remain sole authority
objective.reason_for_controlled_expansion: The 4-case controlled expansion passed with all hard gates intact. It probes two orthogonal behavioral dimensions: mirrored lane-change direction and stop-vs-prepare arbitration.

why_selected: Orthogonal to ml_right_positive_core — same LC contract but mirrored direction (left).
Exposes whether agent respects route_option=keep_left and preferred_lane=left in shadow output.
stage3b_behavior_timeline is present in case spec (no synthetic fallback needed).
High determinism_level — low risk of timeline instability.
Existing Stage 5A + 5B gate confirming this case is clean on baseline contracts.
LC permission gate tested on both directions across the 4-case ring.
new_cases.shadow_interest: Does agent correctly shadow prepare_lane_change_left / commit_lane_change_left under route constraint? Disagreement logging should be rich here.
new_cases.risk: LOW — mirror of already-passing ml_right case.

why_selected: Covers a third behavioral dimension: arbitration override (stop supersedes in-flight LC prepare).
Agent shadow must NOT request LC when baseline drops it due to emergency_override arbitration.
Tests agent_lane_change_intent_validity_rate under a dynamic arbitration scenario, not just static frames.
stage3b_behavior_timeline is present in case spec.
Expected baseline behaviors include both prepare_lane_change_right and stop_before_obstacle — two distinct intent regimes for agent to shadow.
The 'stop supersedes prepare' pattern is the highest-risk shadow disagreement surface in the existing corpus.
new_cases.shadow_interest: Will agent correctly mirror the arbitration-triggered stop, or will it continue requesting LC after baseline has cancelled? Disagreement events here are the most analytically valuable in the expansion.
new_cases.risk: MEDIUM — determinism_level=medium. Need to confirm stage3b_behavior_timeline is stable enough for shadow. If it is, agent contract enforcement on this case is the most important thing to verify before any future expansion.

cases_explicitly_excluded.reason: Topology mismatch — junction_straight is structurally different from the LC/stop regime. Adding it now dilutes the focused expansion signal. Add in the next wave if 4-case ring is stable.

Failure replay case. Family=failure_replay. Running shadow on a failure replay case is premature — the baseline intentionally produces a forbidden behavior pattern. Shadow on this case requires separate design to avoid masking agent contract violations as expected failures.
Same as above — failure replay, separate wave.
status=planned/corpus_pending. Not ready for Stage 7C expansion.

invariants_unchanged: shadow_mode = True in all agent outputs
agent has NO control / trajectory / MPC authority
baseline tactical + MPC remain sole authority
no assist mode, no takeover, no authority hand-off
LC not requested when lane_change_permission = False

warnings_acceptable.condition: For the actual controlled expansion run, the case specs must resolve to existing stage3b_behavior_timeline artifacts.
Stage 7C runs on shadow tactical layer, not MPC shadow path. Stage 6 readiness is not a blocker for Stage 7C. Flag is informational only.

Must be resolved before the 4-case expansion stabilizes. Stage 7A replay gate should be run first to confirm contract layer works on frozen corpus before running online. Acceptable as warning only for first expansion pass.
Stub adapter in stub_v1 mirrors baseline — zero disagreement is expected. When a real LLM adapter is wired, this metric must become non-null. For stub runs: acceptable.
Diagnostic only metric. Null is expected when stop_target artifact is missing.

warnings_not_acceptable.action_required: STOP expansion. Fix adapter contract enforcement before proceeding.
STOP expansion. Root cause before adding new cases.
Fix adapter or timeout budget before expansion.
STOP expansion immediately — agent is requesting unsafe LC. This is a contract violation, not a warning.

warnings_not_acceptable.warning: stage3b_behavior_timeline missing for new cases (ml_left, arbitration_stop)
warnings_not_acceptable.action_required: Do NOT add the case to expansion set until live timeline is confirmed present. Using synthetic frames for new cases defeats the expansion objective.

assist_mode_discussion: NOT APPLICABLE at Stage 7C. Assist mode requires a separate Stage 8 design review with distinct authority transfer contracts, safety proof, and human operator sign-off. Stage 7C is shadow analysis only.
